name: open-gates
description: Open Gates — see and control business operations on a verifiable acceptance standard. Reference engine, conformance suite, spatial map.

scripts.demo:zone: node packages/engine/src/zone-cli.ts --gate examples/construction/systems/gate.json --gate examples/facilities/gate.json examples/construction/systems/structure.accept.json examples/construction/systems/envelope.accept.json examples/construction/systems/mep.review.json examples/construction/systems/fitout.submitted.json examples/facilities/scenario.accept.json --model viz/model/building.json
scripts.viz:attachments: node packages/engine/src/zone-cli.ts --gate examples/construction/systems/gate.json --gate examples/facilities/gate.json examples/construction/systems/structure.accept.json examples/construction/systems/envelope.accept.json examples/construction/systems/mep.review.json examples/construction/systems/fitout.submitted.json examples/facilities/scenario.accept.json --model viz/model/building.json --json viz/model/attachments.json
scripts.demo:flows: node packages/engine/src/flow-cli.ts --gate examples/operations/flow.gate.json --gate examples/construction/systems/gate.json examples/operations/deliver-rebar.accept.json examples/operations/rent-crane.accept.json examples/operations/transport-crew.accept.json examples/operations/consume-rebar.json examples/operations/consume-crane.json examples/operations/consume-crew.json examples/construction/systems/structure.accept.json --model viz/model/graph.json
scripts.viz:flows: node packages/engine/src/flow-cli.ts --gate examples/operations/flow.gate.json --gate examples/construction/systems/gate.json examples/operations/deliver-rebar.accept.json examples/operations/rent-crane.accept.json examples/operations/transport-crew.accept.json examples/operations/consume-rebar.json examples/operations/consume-crane.json examples/operations/consume-crew.json examples/construction/systems/structure.accept.json --model viz/model/graph.json --flows viz/model/flows.json --ledger viz/model/ledger.json
